<features>
- observable feature: flower has light pink petals
- observable feature: flower has a dark purple center
- observable feature: flower has a distinct downward-curving shape
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has light pink petals AND flower has a dark purple center AND flower has a distinct downward-curving shape] THEN [87]
- IF [flower has a pink, spiky, upright inflorescence AND green strap-like leaves] THEN [92]
- IF [flower has yellow petals with a distinct three-petal structure AND green sword-like leaves] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a flower with light pink petals, a dark purple center, and a distinct downward-curving shape, which matches the features of class 87.
</rule_check>
<response>87</response>

</kb>

</rule_check>
<response>92</response>
